hero.title: Effortless Cleanliness
hero.subtitle: Uzbekistan's first subscription-based regular waste collection and sorting service. Save time and help the environment.

problem.title: Tired of Trash?
problem.subtitle: Leave the worries to us, and enjoy cleanliness and comfort yourself.
problem.desc2: Having to sort and dispose yourself
problem.solution_desc1: Always clean bins in the yard

solution.title: We Take Care of It
solution.desc: TozaGo collects your trash right from your door according to a convenient schedule.

features.title: Why Choose TozaGo
features.f4_desc: Earn points for every proper pickup and exchange them for unique eco-prizes or discounts.
features.f5_desc: Our bot and dispatch team are always in touch. Resolving any pickup issues in minutes.

how.title: How Subscription Works
how.step1_desc: Choose a suitable tariff and leave a request on the website or in the app.
how.step2_desc: We will bring convenient eco-containers for sorting to your home.
how.step3: We collect waste 3 times a week
how.step3_desc: On appointed days we quietly pick up the garbage, leaving cleanliness.

showcase.title: Manage in one click
showcase.desc: Our mobile app lets you easily manage your subscription, track pickup schedules, and earn eco-bonuses.
showcase.f2_desc: We will remind you about garbage collection the day before
showcase.f3_desc: Track your personal contribution to the environment

pricing.title: Simple and Clear Pricing
pricing.alert_payment:
Payment for plan simulated.
Check the Admin dashboard (/admin).

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.desc: Leave your details and we will contact you within 15 minutes to process your subscription and answer questions.
contact.name: Your Name

cta.title: Ready to Make the City Cleaner?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of families who have already chosen comfort and caring for nature with TozaGo.
